title: com.temis.decision.evaluated.v1
description: Data payload of a temis decision result event (ADR-0023, WP-54). Written by temisd's audit sink after an evaluation and by temis-clio-worker in answer to a command (ADR-0033). The additive `requestId` is present only on command-driven events, so it is optional here — one schema validates both producers. See docs/80-clio-decision-log.md.

modelId.description: Content-addressed model id — the exact, reproducible model version.

decision.description: Name or id of the evaluated decision.

input.description: The input the decision was evaluated against.

trace.description: Optional decision trace (WP-51), present only when the evaluation requested `explain`.

strict.description: Whether strict input validation was active (WP-52). Set by the sink; absent on worker-written events.

inputHash.description: Stable digest over (modelId, decision, input) — the sink's idempotency key.

requestId.description: Correlation id (ADR-0033): the clio event id of the command that triggered this evaluation. Absent on sink-written events.
